response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth with 20 years of software engineering experience and relevant infrastructure and testing framework knowledge, he lacks a critical requirement: people management experience. The resume shows no evidence of managing teams, conducting performance reviews, or developing people, and his current role is a Staff Engineer (individual contributor track) with no indication of management career interest. For a full-time people-leadership role requiring 2+ years in people management, this is a disqualifying gap.
strengths: Extensive technical breadth: 20 years across web, mobile, backend, embedded, infrastructure, and DevOps across multiple languages
Direct relevant infrastructure knowledge: built and maintained CI/CD systems, DevOps tooling, and created testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Demonstrated teaching ability: created courses, workshops, conference talks, and Code Kata sessions showing knowledge-sharing capability
concerns: No people management experience despite role requiring 2+ years: no evidence of managing teams, hiring, performance reviews, or career development
Currently on individual contributor track (Staff Engineer) with no visible movement toward or interest in people management
Developer tools experience appears secondary to primary software engineering focus; unclear if meets 3 years of concentrated developer tools leadership at scale

key_factors.factor: Strong technical depth in infrastructure and tooling
